Meta.title: ChargeBase UA — Portable Power Station 2400W | LiFePO4

Hero.title: Energy independence for your home

Powers.sectionSubtitle: Select appliances and see how many hours the station will run on a single charge

Tech.sectionSubtitle: Why LiFePO4 is the best choice for home

feature1.title: LiFePO4 cells
feature1.description: Don't burn, don't explode. Safe even when damaged. Last 10+ years with daily use.

feature2.title: Pure sine wave
feature2.description: Critical for heating boilers, medical equipment and sensitive electronics. Won't damage expensive devices.

feature3.title: Fast charging
feature3.description: From 0 to 80% in 1.5 hours from a regular outlet. Supports solar panel charging.

How.sectionSubtitle: Transparent process with no hidden fees

step1.title: Order
step1.description: You place an order on the website and pay in hryvnia.

step2.title: Logistics
step2.description: The product ships via international mail. Tracking number provided within 3–5 days.

step3.title: Delivery
step3.description: Pick up your parcel at a Nova Poshta branch. No customs fees!

guarantee.title: Money-back guarantee
guarantee.description: If the product arrives damaged — full refund or replacement.

support.title: Technical support
support.description: We'll help with setup and answer all questions on Telegram or Viber.

reviews.title: Real reviews
